---
title: "R'tistler Project Lab"
---

# Welcome to Our Project! 🚀

This website showcases our work for the **EMU 430 - Data Analytics** course. Here, you can find our end-to-end data analysis process, interactive visualizations, and detailed reports regarding our findings.

::: column-margin
![Hello there!](images/mikeoo-01.gif)
:::

### Project Overview

In this project, we analyze the impact of macroeconomic variables on visitor arrivals in **TRNC (Northern Cyprus)**. Our goal is to provide data-driven insights into tourism trends using advanced R programming and statistical modeling.

### Quick Access

-   [Exploratory Data Analysis](analysis.qmd)
-   [Data Source & Preprocessing](data.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Team Members (Team R'tistler)

Our project is a collaborative effort by a dedicated team of aspiring industrial engineers.

| Name                        | Profile                                   |
|-----------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| **Eda Can**                 | [GitHub](https://github.com/edaacanlab)   |
| **Başak Özer**              | [GitHub](https://github.com/basakozerlab) |
| **Cihangir Alperen Tokgöz** | [GitHub](https://github.com/cihangiir)    |
| **Ece Özlem Özcan**         | [GitHub](https://github.com/eceozcann)    |
| **Sena Sivrikaya**          | [GitHub](https://github.com/ssivrikaya)   |

::: callout-note
## Collaboration

This project was developed for the EMU 430 Data Analytics course at Hacettepe University.
:::

|     |
|-----|
|     |
